name: sdlc-workflow
description: Four skill-mode routers (`/wf`, `/wf-meta`, `/wf-docs`, `/review`) driving a 10-stage SDLC lifecycle from intake through retro — with per-slice artifacts, runtime-truth verification, and PO-confirmed stack fingerprinting. Design folds into `/wf design`; quick/standalone flows are `/wf intake` modes plus the `/wf probe` and `/wf simplify` keys.
